scripts.package:dmg: pnpm build:macos && mkdir -p dist && rm -f dist/SuiteHub-1.0.0.dmg && create-dmg --volname SuiteHub --volicon apps/mobile/macos/Runner/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/app_icon_512.png --window-pos 200 120 --window-size 600 400 --icon-size 100 --icon SuiteHub.app 150 185 --app-drop-link 450 185 --no-internet-enable dist/SuiteHub-1.0.0.dmg apps/mobile/build/macos/Build/Products/Release/SuiteHub.app
